### Issue URL (Ads) [https://mangafire.to/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmangafire.to%2F) ### Comment > Whenever I click an in-site button or whenever I click something on MangaFire, it redirects me to this other site that doesn’t even load up. This happens about every one hour or so and it’s something that AdGuard has not yet blocked. This happened after MangaFire got a maintenance update, and I first removed my history then I updated my AdGuard to make sure ads or redirects appeared, but it seems AdGuard has missed one. > > Please give AdGuard an update to fix this issue, and let me know when the update is done by emailing me.
